editions.name: The Sea Blue Edition
editions.flavor_description: A refreshing energy drink with the delicious taste of Juneberry
editions.alt_text: Red Bull The Sea Blue Edition - Image

editions.name: The Pink Edition Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: An energy drink with the taste of Forest Fruits and a surprising spicy touch of verbena, containing no sugar

editions.name: The Red Edition
editions.flavor_description: A refreshing energy drink featuring the distinct and sweet taste of Watermelon

editions.name: The Spring Edition
editions.flavor_description: A floral energy drink with the taste of Cherry and notes of almond and Cherry Blossom

editions.name: The Apple Edition
editions.flavor_description: A crisp energy drink with the taste of Fuji Apple and a warm touch of Ginger

editions.name: The Ice Edition
editions.flavor_description: An energy drink with the exceptional taste of Blueberry, Vanilla, and icy fresh notes of eucalyptus

editions.name: Energy Drink Zero
editions.flavor_description: The classic Red Bull energy experience without any sugar

editions.name: The Lime Green Edition
editions.flavor_description: An exotic energy drink with the taste of Curuba, finished with a hint of Elderflower

editions.name: The Lilac Edition
editions.flavor_description: A fresh and tangy energy drink combining Pink Grapefruit and Woodruff, refined with floral accents

editions.name: Energy Drink
editions.flavor_description: The original Red Bull Energy Drink formula to help revitalize body and mind

editions.name: The Green Edition
editions.flavor_description: A refreshing energy drink with the exotic taste of Dragon Fruit

editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: The classic Red Bull Energy Drink without the sugar

editions.name: The Peach Edition
editions.flavor_description: A smooth energy drink with the taste of White Peach, citrus zest, and floral accents

editions.name: The Apricot Edition
editions.flavor_description: An energy drink offering the perfect mix of Apricot and Strawberry with a touch of Peach
